---
name: Performance
about: Report a slowdown or propose a performance improvement
title: "[PERF] <short description>"
labels: performance
assignees: ''
---

**Problem description**
Which scenario feels slow? (e.g., navigation, page build, animation)

**Observed measurements**
- Average time: ___ ms  
- Profiling output (DevTools, Observatory) – link or screenshot

**Environment**
- Flutter version: `flutter --version`  
- Platform: iOS / Android / Web  
- Device: model / emulator

**Proposed optimization**
- Suggested change (e.g., algorithm tweak, use `const`, add `RepaintBoundary`, cache results, etc.)  
- Why this should help

**Testing / validation**
How to verify that the change actually improves performance (e.g., benchmark steps, CI test, profiling comparison)
